info.title: dryAPI Gateway API
info.description: Unified OpenAI-compatible inference gateway with async job orchestration, provider controls, and webhook tooling.

tags.name: Jobs
tags.description: Provider-agnostic async status, download, and websocket streaming routes.

tags.name: RunPod Jobs
tags.description: Direct provider operational routes for run, runsync, status, and queue control.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Webhook signature and delivery testing routes.

post.description: Accepts an OpenAI-compatible chat payload and queues execution on the routed provider endpoint. Returns `202 Accepted` immediately with request metadata and provider job details.

model.description: Active chat model slug used for OpenAI-compatible chat routing.

role.description: Role for each chat message in the conversation history.

content.description: Message text content passed to the selected model.

messages.description: Conversation message list in OpenAI chat format.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature. Lower values are more deterministic.

stream.description: Request token streaming from the upstream provider when supported.

user.description: Caller-provided user identifier for traceability and abuse monitoring.

webhook_url.description: Optional HTTPS webhook URL for async status updates.

400.description: Invalid payload or missing endpoint routing configuration.

error.message: No RunPod endpoint configured for surface chat

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key.

429.description: Rate-limited by edge or API-key quota controls.

502.description: Upstream provider returned a non-success response.

get.description: Returns available credits for the authenticated caller identity routed through the credit shard durable object ledger.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key.

post.description: Queues image generation using the configured model and endpoint mapping. The response is asynchronous and includes a provider job payload for downstream polling.

model.description: Active image model slug used for OpenAI-compatible image routing.

prompt.description: Natural-language prompt used for image generation.
examples: A moody cyberpunk alley at night with rain reflections, 35mm film look

negative_prompt.description: Optional content to discourage in the generated output.

size.description: Requested output size in WIDTHxHEIGHT format.

response_format.description: Preferred image payload format when provider supports it.

webhook_url.description: Optional HTTPS webhook URL for async status updates.

202.description: Image generation request accepted and queued.

400.description: Invalid request payload or missing endpoint configuration.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key.

post.description: Submits an async transcription job using the configured provider endpoint. Returns quickly with queue metadata and provider job state.

model.description: Active transcription model slug used for OpenAI-compatible transcription routing.

audioUrl.description: Publicly accessible audio URL to transcribe.

language.description: Optional BCP-47 language hint, such as `en` or `es`.

prompt.description: Optional prompt to bias transcription output.
examples: The call discusses GPU usage billing and webhook retries.

response_format.description: Preferred output format when provider supports custom transcript renderers.

webhook_url.description: Optional HTTPS webhook URL for async status updates.

400.description: Invalid request payload or missing endpoint configuration.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key.

post.description: Queues embedding generation for one or many input strings and returns async job metadata. Use job status/download routes to resolve final vectors.

model.description: Active embeddings model slug used for OpenAI-compatible embedding routing.

examples: How to optimize cold starts for serverless GPUs

anyOf.description: Batch input strings to embed in one request.

dimensions.description: Optional embedding dimensionality override when supported by the model.

encoding_format.description: Vector encoding preference when supported by the provider.

user.description: Caller-provided user identifier for tracing and abuse monitoring.

webhook_url.description: Optional HTTPS webhook URL for async status updates.

400.description: Invalid request payload or missing endpoint configuration.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key.

get.description: Returns the latest provider status for an async inference request. Use this route for polling when webhook delivery is not configured.

parameters.name: surface
parameters.description: Inference surface used to select the provider endpoint.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: Provider job identifier returned from an enqueue route.

parameters.name: endpointId
parameters.description: Optional provider endpoint override. If omitted, routing uses surface/model mapping.

200.description: Provider status payload for the requested job.

400.description: Invalid path/query parameters or unresolved endpoint mapping.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key.

404.description: Job not found for the selected surface/endpoint.

get.summary: Download links or serialized payload for a completed job
get.description: Fetches provider result links when available, or returns a serialized payload as JSON/TXT attachment fallback.

parameters.name: surface
parameters.description: Inference surface used to select the provider endpoint.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: Provider job identifier returned from an enqueue route.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Download file format when no direct media links are available.

200.description: Result links or serialized payload export.

400.description: Invalid path/query parameters or unresolved endpoint mapping.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key.

404.description: Job not found for the selected surface/endpoint.

get.summary: Stream async job status over WebSocket
get.description: Upgrades to a WebSocket connection and emits periodic job status/result frames until the provider reports a terminal state.

parameters.name: surface
parameters.description: Inference surface used to select the provider endpoint.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: Provider job identifier returned from an enqueue route.

parameters.name: endpointId
parameters.description: Optional provider endpoint override. If omitted, routing uses surface/model mapping.

400.description: Invalid path/query parameters or unresolved endpoint mapping.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key.

426.description: Upgrade header missing. Client must connect via WebSocket.

get.summary: List dynamic pricing snapshots for a surface
get.description: Returns worker-calculated pricing snapshots derived from runtime analytics. Prices are computed with a hard 200% profit floor (3x effective unit cost) and refreshed continuously from recent request statistics.

parameters.name: surface
parameters.description: Inference surface used to select the provider endpoint.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Model slug used for endpoint routing and cost estimation.

parameters.name: endpointId
parameters.description: Optional endpoint filter and quote override.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum snapshots to return, newest first.

200.description: Pricing snapshots and active quote for the current routing context.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key.

get.description: Returns recent queue snapshots from D1 (queue depth, batch size, average runtime). Historical retention is trimmed to the last 48 hours.

200.description: Queue metric snapshots in descending timestamp order.

get.summary: Stream live queue batch scaling updates
get.description: Streams server-sent events with dynamic batch scaling payloads built from queue metrics and runtime analytics.

200.description: SSE stream that emits live queue batch scaling updates.

get.summary: Get dynamic queue batch scaling table
get.description: Builds a real-time batch scaling table from queue depth snapshots and recent runtime analytics to suggest model-level batch sizes and throughput.

200.description: Dynamic batch scaling table and queue summary.

post.summary: Send a signed webhook test event
post.description: Dispatches a synthetic signed webhook payload to validate URL reachability and signature verification before enabling production callbacks.

webhook_url.description: Destination URL that receives signed test events. HTTPS is required.

event.description: Test webhook event type to send. Defaults to `job.processing`.

data.description: Optional payload object included as the webhook event data.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key.

500.description: Webhook dispatch failed or gateway execution error.

post.description: Direct provider control route that calls RunPod `/run`. Prefer OpenAI-compatible surface routes for public clients unless provider-level behavior is required.

parameters.name: surface
parameters.description: Inference surface used to select the provider endpoint.

parameters.name: endpointId
parameters.description: Optional provider endpoint override. If omitted, routing uses surface/model mapping.

endpointId.description: Explicit RunPod endpoint ID. Overrides default endpoint mapping when provided.

model.description: Model slug used for endpoint routing and cost estimation.

input.description: Provider input payload forwarded to RunPod as `input`.

examples.prompt: A cinematic aerial shot of neon Tokyo in the rain.

webhook_url.description: HTTPS URL that receives signed status updates for this job.

policy.description: Optional policy hints used by gateway routing and execution controls.

s3Config.description: Optional object-storage output configuration for provider artifacts.

200.description: RunPod accepted request and returned provider payload.

400.description: Invalid payload or unresolved endpoint routing.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key.

post.description: Direct provider control route that calls RunPod `/runsync` and waits for completion in a single request lifecycle.

parameters.name: surface
parameters.description: Inference surface used to select the provider endpoint.

parameters.name: endpointId
parameters.description: Optional provider endpoint override. If omitted, routing uses surface/model mapping.

endpointId.description: Explicit RunPod endpoint ID. Overrides default endpoint mapping when provided.

model.description: Model slug used for endpoint routing and cost estimation.

input.description: Provider input payload forwarded to RunPod as `input`.

examples.prompt: A cinematic aerial shot of neon Tokyo in the rain.

webhook_url.description: HTTPS URL that receives signed status updates for this job.

policy.description: Optional policy hints used by gateway routing and execution controls.

s3Config.description: Optional object-storage output configuration for provider artifacts.

400.description: Invalid payload or unresolved endpoint routing.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key.

get.description: Returns raw provider status payload for a specific RunPod job.

parameters.name: surface
parameters.description: Inference surface used to select the provider endpoint.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: Provider job identifier returned when a request is accepted.

parameters.name: endpointId
parameters.description: Optional provider endpoint override. If omitted, routing uses surface/model mapping.

400.description: Invalid parameters or unresolved endpoint mapping.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key.

get.description: Forwards provider `/stream` output for the requested job. Useful for incremental updates where supported by the model endpoint.

parameters.name: surface
parameters.description: Inference surface used to select the provider endpoint.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: Provider job identifier returned when a request is accepted.

parameters.name: endpointId
parameters.description: Optional provider endpoint override. If omitted, routing uses surface/model mapping.

200.description: RunPod `/stream` response payload or event stream.

400.description: Invalid parameters or unresolved endpoint mapping.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key.

post.description: Requests cancellation for a queued or running provider job.

parameters.name: surface
parameters.description: Inference surface used to select the provider endpoint.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: Provider job identifier returned when a request is accepted.

parameters.name: endpointId
parameters.description: Optional provider endpoint override. If omitted, routing uses surface/model mapping.

400.description: Invalid parameters or unresolved endpoint mapping.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key.

post.description: Requests provider-level retry for a prior job execution.

parameters.name: surface
parameters.description: Inference surface used to select the provider endpoint.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: Provider job identifier returned when a request is accepted.

parameters.name: endpointId
parameters.description: Optional provider endpoint override. If omitted, routing uses surface/model mapping.

400.description: Invalid parameters or unresolved endpoint mapping.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key.

post.description: Requests provider queue purge for pending jobs on the selected endpoint.

parameters.name: surface
parameters.description: Inference surface used to select the provider endpoint.

parameters.name: endpointId
parameters.description: Optional provider endpoint override. If omitted, routing uses surface/model mapping.

400.description: Invalid parameters or unresolved endpoint mapping.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key.

get.description: Returns provider endpoint health details for the selected surface mapping.

parameters.name: surface
parameters.description: Inference surface used to select the provider endpoint.

parameters.name: endpointId
parameters.description: Optional provider endpoint override. If omitted, routing uses surface/model mapping.

400.description: Invalid parameters or unresolved endpoint mapping.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key.
